title: $PHIB — memecoin launch playbook
html:
TL;DR

  • $PHIB was a bsc binance smart chain memecoin Yahir attempted to launch in 2023 — three goals: chuckle the internet, build a banded community, eventually ship a staking protocol.
  • The doc is operational (CMC application, Pancakeswap LP, Twitter/Telegram/Discord setup, Wix site) — a playbook ledger of what it actually takes to push a token live.
  • Six PHIB wallets + a CEX wallet were generated, suggesting Yahir was thinking about distributed seed and exchange-listing logistics, not just a one-bag deploy.
  • $PHIB is the lineage entry between corvallis crypto club curiosity and the eventual rankett thesis: same instinct (find an early lever, ship through it), different surface area.
  • Privacy: original doc contained plaintext credentials for Gmail / Twitter / Wix / Infura / Discord / Instagram — all redacted from the summary.

What it actually was

$PHIB ("amphibian meme space" — Yahir's tongue-in-cheek positioning against the pepe coin / popecoin / sponge vip cluster) was a binance smart chain token built using pancakeswap for liquidity. The contract address is in the raw doc; six PHIB wallets and a designated cex wallet were pre-funded.

The threefold mission Yahir wrote: bring a chuckle, band $PHIB people together, eventually offer staking yield. That progression — meme → community → cashflow primitive — is the standard memecoin-trying-to-be-real-protocol arc.

The launch ledger

The doc is mostly a checklist:

  • CMC (coinmarketcap) listing application — sent
  • BscScan resubmit
  • Paid advertising stance — TBD
  • TikTok strategy — TBD
  • Alt Twitter accounts — pending
  • Telegram + community managers
  • Wix website ($23/mo) + domain ($15/yr)
  • LP video research, bsc gems alert outreach
  • Decision: Discord yes/no
  • Tokenomics graphic: stealth launch, no presale, "project by goobers"
  • Naming convention for community: $PHIB_(name) — Yahir's was $PHIB_Phrank

DEX listing tracker covered Biswap, Thena, Mdex, plus the standard crawl through Dextools / Etherscan / dexscreener.

Why it matters in the graph

This is Yahir at the crypto builder era surface: shipping a token, doing the unsexy work of CMC applications and LP videos, learning the actual mechanics of a launch. The thread connects backward to corvallis crypto club and forward to the ai search optimization discipline he'd later sell through rankett — same instinct of finding an early lever, different stack.

The line "Offloading things… there is a connecting point to these information that is integral to the system, yet it is not a part of the system themselves… has me thinking about rollups" is a small flash of systems thinking mid-launch — Yahir noticing that the architecture of crypto rollups is a metaphor for offloaded cognition. Worth flagging as a disconnected from outcome moment.

Related

  • cam jipp pre rankett idea — the Summer/Fall 2024 Diddles+Jipp moonshot workshop that flipped this stack from BSC to Solana

Privacy

The raw doc contains plaintext passwords for the project's Gmail, Twitter, Wix, Infura, Discord, and Instagram accounts. None reproduced here. If $PHIB infrastructure still exists, those credentials should be rotated regardless.
